seo.title: Draw to Edit – Sketch-Based Image Editing | OpenCreator
seo.description: Edit images by drawing simple strokes or shapes. AI interprets your marks to add, remove, or transform elements with visual instructions instead of complex tools.
keywords: edit images by drawing with ai

hero.title: Draw to Edit
hero.description: Edit images by drawing simple strokes or shapes to indicate changes. Let AI interpret your marks—adding, removing, or transforming elements—so you can direct edits visually.
hero.inputPlaceholder: Upload an image and draw where you want changes

steps.title: Upload your base image
steps.description: Provide product photos, scenes, or compositions that need adjustments.

steps.title: Draw over the image to indicate edits
steps.description: Use strokes or shapes to add, remove, move, or modify elements.

steps.title: Generate AI-applied edits from drawings
steps.description: AI interprets your marks as instructions and updates the image accordingly.

steps.title: Refine with additional passes if needed
steps.description: Iterate by drawing new adjustments until the result matches your vision.

whoIsFor.title: For people who think visually, not in tools and sliders
whoIsFor.subtitle: From art directors to founders, see who edits by drawing.

audiences.label: Art directors and designers
audiences.description: Communicate changes directly on images without long briefs.

audiences.label: Founders and non-technical stakeholders
audiences.description: Express changes visually even without design skills.

audiences.label: Illustrators and concept artists
audiences.description: Rough in ideas and let AI handle finer execution.

audiences.label: Product and UX teams
audiences.description: Mark up UI or marketing visuals for quick iteration.

items.question: What is the Draw to Edit workflow?
items.answer: An AI workflow that turns sketch marks into image edits—add, remove, transform, and move elements with simple strokes.

items.question: Who should use this?
items.answer: Designers, founders, illustrators, and product teams who prefer visual directions over complex tools.

items.question: What inputs are required?
items.answer: Upload an image and draw strokes or shapes where you want changes. Optionally add text notes.

items.question: What outputs will I get?
items.answer: Edited images reflecting your visual instructions, ready for reviews or production use.

items.question: Can I iterate easily?
items.answer: Yes. Draw additional passes to refine results until they align with your vision.

items.question: How do credits work?
items.answer: Each edit pass consumes credits based on scope and resolution. Iterate within your plan.
